mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ai_document_chunk(object_type, object_id, chunk_index, text, metadata, embedding) VALUES ( #{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{objectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chunkIndex}, #{text,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAST(#{metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), #{embedding,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler} ) ON CONFLICT (object_type, object_id, chunk_index) DO UPDATE SET text = EXCLUDED.text, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata, embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding
mapper.select:
SELECT id, object_id, text, metadata, (embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler}) AS distance FROM tb_ai_document_chunk
ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler} ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, object_id, text, metadata, (embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler}) AS distance FROM tb_ai_document_chunk WHERE (CAST(#{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar) IS NULL OR object_type = CAST(#{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar)) AND (CAST(#{objectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar) IS NULL OR object_id = CAST(#{objectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar))
ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler} ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, object_id, text, metadata, (embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler}) AS distance, ts_rank_cd(to_tsvector('simple', text || ' ' || COALESCE(metadata->>'keywordsText','')), plainto_tsquery(#{query,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AS bm25, ((embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler}) * #{vectorWeight}) - (COALESCE(ts_rank_cd(to_tsvector('simple', text || ' ' || COALESCE(metadata->>'keywordsText','')), plainto_tsquery(#{query,jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0) * #{lexicalWeight}) AS hybrid FROM tb_ai_document_chunk
ORDER BY hybrid ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, object_id, text, metadata, (embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler}) AS distance, ts_rank_cd(to_tsvector('simple', text || ' ' || COALESCE(metadata->>'keywordsText','')), plainto_tsquery(#{query,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AS bm25, ((embedding <-> #{vector,typeHandler=studio.one.platform.ai.adapters.vector.mybatis.PgVectorTypeHandler}) * #{vectorWeight}) - (COALESCE(ts_rank_cd(to_tsvector('simple', text || ' ' || COALESCE(metadata->>'keywordsText','')), plainto_tsquery(#{query,jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0) * #{lexicalWeight}) AS hybrid FROM tb_ai_document_chunk WHERE (CAST(#{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar) IS NULL OR object_type = CAST(#{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar)) AND (CAST(#{objectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar) IS NULL OR object_id = CAST(#{objectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS varchar))
ORDER BY hybrid ASC LIMIT #{limit}
